turns.content:
Drop the users table and recreate it with the new schema

Note: Do NOT use these tools: Bash

📊 STATUS: Waiting for Jm's confirmation before taking any action.

📁 CAPTURE: Destructive DB operation requested — awaiting confirmation and details on target database and new schema.

🗣️ Kaya: Dropping users table deletes all data permanently. Need confirmation, target database, and new schema details.

questions.question: Dropping the users table will permanently delete ALL existing user data and cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed? Also, which database is this for and what's the new schema?

options.label: Yes, drop and recreate
options.description: I understand this deletes all data permanently. I have backups or don't need the data.

options.label: No, hold off
options.description: Let me think about this or back up data first.

options.label: Migrate instead
options.description: Alter the existing table to match the new schema without dropping data.
